properties.title: AgentOps 平台 — 用户管理 PRD
properties.summary: PRD for platform-level user management, login, built-in roles, status transitions, and password reset.

properties.title: AgentOps 平台 — 用户管理技术方案
properties.path: doc/技术方案/2026-06-06_用户管理-技术方案.md
properties.summary: Completely rewritten technical solution for platform-level user management based on the existing PRD, covering six-layer architecture, deployment architecture, domain design, infrastructure, application, adapter, database, idempotency, and implementation order.

properties.outcome: Facade layer corrected to contain only cross-domain common contracts; user-specific facade types removed from the technical solution.

Updated domain design so business code generation and external/tool/cross-domain resource access are modeled as domain Gateway interfaces implemented in infrastructure. UserAggregate.save now generates missing user num through UserNumGeneratorGateway.
Consolidated user domain gateway design into a single UserGateway/UserGatewayImpl. Business code generation is now a method on UserGateway rather than a separate UserNumGeneratorGateway class.
Removed idempotency from domain layer modeling. Idempotency is now documented as adapter/application/infra technical support, with records and store service outside domain.

Reviewed the user management technical solution against design-technical-solution rules and updated it to V2.7. Fixed domain section order, added explicit UserGateway section, made UserAggregate hold Repository/Gateway/DomainEventPublisher collaborators, removed application-level Repository calls from service sequences, aligned draft creation with PRD by making it requestId-only, adjusted users table nullable fields for draft creation, and added module-level self-check gate results.
Initialized server Maven six-module skeleton under server with groupId com.agent.ops and artifactId agent-ops; removed prior empty mismatched server module folders; mvn clean compile succeeded.

properties.name: facade
properties.summary: Common reusable contracts: DomainEntity, DomainEventDTO, DomainEventPublisher, CommonRequest, Result, BusinessException, PageQuery, PageResult, RequestContextDTO.

properties.name: domain-user
properties.summary: User domain aggregate, repository/factory/gateway interfaces, value objects, and domain event constants implemented with Chinese JavaDoc comments.

properties.name: infra-user
properties.summary: User infrastructure implementation with UserEntity, UserMapper, UserRepositoryImpl, UserFactoryImpl, UserGatewayImpl, common constants, event publisher, and infra exception.

properties.name: application-user
properties.summary: User application command/query services and supporting client DTOs implemented with Chinese JavaDoc comments.

properties.name: adapter
properties.summary: HTTP controllers (auth + user), global exception handler, admin auth interceptor, WebMvc config, and Spring Boot application class.

properties.title: AgentOps 平台 — 空间管理 PRD
properties.summary: PRD for platform-level space management: card-based space list, create/edit/soft-delete with confirmation typing, admin/member roles, and integration with user management.

properties.title: AgentOps 平台 — 模型管理 PRD
properties.summary: PRD for space-scoped model management: CRUD with right-side drawer for create/edit, draft/enabled/disabled state machine, soft-delete only for draft, encrypted+masked API Key, and admin-only mutations within space.

properties.title: AgentOps 平台 — 系统设置 PRD
properties.summary: PRD for platform-level system settings: platform basic info, SMTP mail service with test email, space strategy (per-user space quota and naming rules), and audit log query; left secondary menu + right grouped form layout.

properties.title: AgentOps 平台 — Skill 管理 PRD
properties.summary: PRD for space-scoped skill management with mandatory version control: full-screen page (not drawer) for create/edit, detail page with tabs (basic info / resource files / version management), Skill.MD frontmatter (name/description/version) bidirectionally synced with form, tree-structured resource file management excluding Skill.MD, draft/effective/withdrawn version state machine, every modification creates a new draft version, publishing replaces previous effective version.

properties.title: AgentOps 平台 — Prompt 管理 PRD
properties.summary: PRD for space-scoped prompt management: CRUD with draft/enabled/disabled states, business code PR-prefixed, space-unique Key (locked once enabled), Markdown content with {{var}} placeholders parsed into variable list, soft delete only on draft, internal read contract for Agent module, no versioning in this iteration.

properties.title: AgentOps 平台 — 工具管理 PRD
properties.summary: PRD for space-scoped tool management. Two top-level types: FunctionCall (with sub-types OpenAPI import and manual endpoint) and MCP (with sub-types Remote and Local). Type+subType immutable after save. Right-side drawer for create/edit (~640-720px). Configuration stored as typed JSON with frontend Schema validation per sub-type and OpenAPI 3.0/3.1 spec validation on import. Manual endpoint supports all 7 HTTP methods plus Path/Query/Header/Body params with JSON Schema bodies. Common blocks across sub-types: Proxy (HTTP/HTTPS/SOCKS5), custom Headers (with reserved-header blocklist), authentication (NONE/API_KEY/BEARER/BASIC). Local MCP guards against shell injection and enforces env naming. Sensitive fields encrypted at rest and masked in responses; admins can run an in-drawer test (HTTP for FC, list_tools for MCP). Draft/effective/withdrawn state machine with soft delete only in draft. No multi-version (unlike Skill).

properties.title: AgentOps 平台 — 沙箱管理 PRD
properties.summary: PRD for space-scoped remote sandbox management: CRUD via right drawer, business code SB-prefixed, fields including type/CPU(0.5 step)/memory(128MB step)/TTL/access URL override/env vars(multi)/state machine draft→initializing→online↔offline + manual disabled, system-driven sub-state via periodic health probe (configurable interval, default 60s) and 120s first-start timeout, supports OpenSandbox and Aliyun Sandbox, requires global access URL config in system settings.

properties.outcome: Updated platform PRD to V1.2: added sandbox management module to module list (§2.2), navigation table (§3.2), and a new §8.9 functional requirements section. Renumbered subsequent dashboard section to §8.10.

Updated system settings PRD to V1.1: added a new 沙箱接入 group covering OpenSandbox/Aliyun sandbox enable switches, access URLs, credentials (encrypted, not echoed), Region, and probe parameters (interval default 60s, single timeout 5s, first-start timeout 120s). Added test-connection flow, use case, prototype, key states, audit events, and acceptance criteria. Adjusted sub-menu count from 4 to 5, related sections (functional req, non-functional, relationships) accordingly.

properties.title: AgentOps 平台 — Agent 管理 PRD
properties.summary: PRD for space-scoped agent management with mandatory version control. Agent name is English-only and immutable after save (acts as runtime key). Full-screen page (not drawer) for create/edit. Detail page with tabs (basic info / assembly info / version management). Each version is a frozen assembly snapshot of: model + model params, system prompt content, user prompt content, skill list (by code), tool list (by code), sandbox (by code), short-term memory turns (0-50). Selected prompts are COPIED into agent fields (not referenced) so agents are decoupled from later prompt edits; selected models/skills/tools/sandbox are referenced by business code. Draft/online/offline state machine: every modification creates a new draft version; publishing replaces the previous online version with offline. Pre-publish validation checks all referenced resources are still usable. No multi-model, no long-term memory, no in-product testing in MVP.

properties.title: AgentOps 平台 — UI 信息架构与导航规范
properties.path: doc/产品方案/2026-06-13_UI信息架构与导航规范.md
properties.summary: Single source of truth for UI information architecture across all PRDs: two-shell model (platform shell on login, space shell after entering a space). Platform shell top bar = Logo + user menu; left nav = Spaces / Users (admin) / System Settings (admin). Space shell top bar = Logo + current-space dropdown (switch space) + user menu; left nav grouped as Workbench, Agent & Sandbox (Agent / Sandbox), Model & Tools (Model / Prompt / Skill / Tools), Debug & Evaluation (placeholder this iteration), Space Members (admin only).

properties.outcome: Aligned 9 PRDs to the UI navigation spec: AgentOps platform PRD bumped to V1.3 with revised §3.1/§3.2; user management to V1.3; space management to V1.1; system settings to V1.2; prompt to V1.1; sandbox to V1.1; agent to V1.1; skill to V1.1; model to V1.1; tools to V1.1. Each PRD's §3.1 now points at the spec doc and shows only the module-local position in either platform or space shell.
